data.content: K-20 plan: tighten ValidateRecipient in internal/store/validate.go. Accept exactly two shapes: (1) 'age1' + Bech32 charset [023456789acdefghjklmnpqrstuvwxyz]+ (typical X25519 length is 62 chars, but allow 50-90 to absorb variance), (2) 'ssh-ed25519 ' or 'ssh-rsa ' followed by base64 blob (RFC4648 alphabet) with optional trailing whitespace+comment. Trim a single trailing newline. Reject everything else with the message 'expected age1... or ssh-ed25519/ssh-rsa ...; got <truncated 32 chars>'. Tests in store_test.go: valid age1, valid ssh-ed25519, malformed age0 rejected, random string rejected, trailing newline trimmed, leading dash rejected.
